value_chain_position: Data protection and cyber resilience platform layer — sells enterprise backup, recovery, and data security software (Commvault Cloud, Metallic SaaS) that protects the data layer of every AI and cloud deployment from ransomware and data loss.
relative_comps: Commvault is the incumbent enterprise data protection vendor transitioning to a cloud/SaaS model (Metallic), competing against fast-growing pure-cloud challengers Rubrik and Cohesity. 19% YoY growth and 20% FCF margin are improving but lag Rubrik's growth trajectory; its multicloud/hybrid coverage and air-gap recovery capabilities are the key differentiators in the AI era where data integrity is mission-critical. The ai_infrastructure tag reflects data protection as a required infrastructure layer for every AI deployment.
